meaning: n.(产于意大利中部Frascati镇的)弗拉斯卡蒂白葡萄甜酒
examples: Time was, when you went to Frascati, you stood a chance of winning a fortune: you played against a bank and, if you lost, you had the consolation of telling yourself you might have won.
The heart of the model contains the sca standard specifications, and different extensions have been created to support the key Open Source sca runtimes - Apache Tuscany V1.4 and Frascati V0.5.
